name: Hopscotch
description: Chalk courts drawn over fresh asphalt, a tossed marker resting in some squares — every redraw redraws the playground.

code.style: --chalkc: @p(var(--color1), var(--color1), var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --tiltc: @rand(-7deg, 7deg); --rule: ( @random(${shapeFrequency}) { :before { content: ''; position: absolute; inset: @rand(10%, 18%); border: calc(30px / @Y) solid var(--chalkc); border-radius: @p(6%, 6%, 50%); opacity: @rand(0.7, 1); transform: rotate(var(--tiltc)); box-sizing: border-box; transition: ease 600ms; } } @random(0.22) { :after { content: ''; position: absolute; @size: @rand(12%, 18%); left: @rand(34%, 54%); top: @rand(34%, 54%); border-radius: @rand(34%, 50%); background: var(--color1); opacity: 0.9; transform: rotate(@rand(360deg)); transition: ease 600ms; } } );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
